description:
You are a Transportation Dispatcher at a commercial freight company planning the weekly Boston-to-Fall River delivery run for a heavy tractor-trailer. Create a GPS data package in Garmin BaseCamp containing the following waypoints and route, then export the collection as a GPX file to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\BostonFallRiver_FreightRoute.gpx.

Waypoints:
- DEPOT SOUTH BOSTON (42.3388, -71.0502), Symbol: Building, Comment: Home depot. Loading dock hrs 05:00-22:00. Truck entrance off Tide St.
- BRIDGE HAZARD RT116 (42.1875, -71.3285), Symbol: Danger
